name: Apple Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sifted flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and ground cloves.
2. Add the butter to the dry ingredients. Use your fingers or a pastry cutter to cut the butter into small pieces until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg, milk, powdered milk, and applesauce until well combined.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring with a fork until just mixed. Be careful not to overmix; some small lumps are okay.
5. Heat a large griddle or frying pan over medium heat. Once hot, pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake.
6. Cook the pancakes for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and bubbly.
7. Serve the warm pancakes topped with butter and your choice of syrup or fresh fruit.
